title: File:El Morocco nightclub New York City 1965.jpg
creator: Wally Heim, United Artist Corporation-Chicago office.
description: Photo of the interior of the El Morocco night club in New York City. The seating was upholstered in blue and white zebra-patterned fabric and was unique to the nightspot. Because of the upholstery, everyone knew whether a celebrity was photographed at El Morocco. Celebrity columnists made their headquarters at the New York night clubs; en:Ed Sullivan was based at El Morocco in his newspaperman days, while en:Walter Winchell had a permanent place at the en:Stork Club 's table 50 in the club's Cub Room.
date: February 1965-stamp is faint and seller listed this as 1985. The original version of the club closed in 1981 and was reopened with major changes in 1987.
